netapp_replications_modal_description_no: No replication selected. Please select one.
netapp_replications_modal_delete_descrip: You are about to cancel this replication request without accepting it. Are you sure you want to continue?
This action will delete the table row and keep the volumes created during the replication process (source and target). Are you sure you want to continue?
Careful, cancelling this replication will halt synchronisation and delete the target volume. Are you sure you want to continue?
Are you sure that you want to delete this replication?
netapp_replications_delete_success: The {{ sourceShareID }} volume replication has been deleted.
netapp_replications_cancel_success: The {{ sourceShareID }} volume is no longer replicated.
netapp_replications_delete_error: Unable to delete the {{ sourceShareID }} volume replication.
netapp_replications_cancel_error: Failed to undo replication for the {{ sourceShareID }} volume.
